TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_1: Don't be silly! That team doesn't even exist on Google.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_2: Nice try, you invented a team! Are you the new Florentino Pérez?
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_3: Hmm... that name rings no bells. Were you dreaming?
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_4: What you typed is not a team. It's a typo and you know it.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_5: We searched everywhere. That team simply doesn't exist.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_6: Dead silence from the database. That team is a ghost.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_7: Seriously? You actually typed that? Try something real.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_8: Nice fantasy, but we play with real teams here!
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_9: That name doesn't match any piece of our puzzle.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_10: Access denied. That team does not exist in our universe.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_11: Interesting choice... too bad it doesn't exist.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_12: You almost had us. But no, nobody knows that team.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_13: Welcome to the circus! But even here teams need to exist.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_14: Search complete: zero results. Try a real team.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_15: We raised one eyebrow. Then the other. Then we gave up.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_16: R.I.P. to your imaginary favorite team.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_17: The database just blew its mind trying to find that.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_18: Quack? Even the ducks have no idea what you're talking about.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_19: We checked every league in the world. Nothing.
TEAM_NOT_FOUND.MSG_20: Winner of the "most invented team of the year" award. Congratulations!

TROPHIES.TITLE: Hall of Fame
TROPHIES.NO_TROPHIES_MESSAGE: You haven't won any league yet.
TROPHIES.NO_TROPHIES_SUBTITLE: Keep playing and you'll be the next champion!

FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_1: Luck wasn't on your side this time! 🎲
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_1: But don't worry, there are always more games!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_2: No worries, next time you'll be luckier!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_3: Not everyone can win all the time! 🤷
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_3: Maybe next time will be the one!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_4: You lost, but you played with style! 😎
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_4: Your class is undeniable, the victory... not so much!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_5: The fastest survivor in the west! 🤠
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_6: And the problem is you're already out!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_7: Didn't even have time to warm up! 🥶
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_9: No one has ever lost this fast!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_10: You have a unique talent for getting eliminated!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_11: You made a fool of yourself! 🐌
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_12: But at least you make the other participants laugh.
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_13: Often eliminated, never a winner. What a record!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_14: Even a snail would've arrived before you! 🐌
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_14: And probably would've won something too.
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_15: You're the main attraction: always part of the eliminations!
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_16: Your victories are in the freezer... since 1800! 🧊
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_16: Frozen so well that no one will ever find them.
FUNNY_MESSAGES.MSG_17: Not even a bone of victory to chew on! 🦴
FUNNY_MESSAGES.SUB_17: Your dog would have better luck than you.

RULES.TITLE: Survivor Rules
RULES.SECTION_1_P1: Each player can choose only one team or athlete for each game turn.
RULES.SECTION_1_P2: The play can be: visible, therefore shown to other players; invisible, therefore hidden until the turn closes.
RULES.SECTION_2_TEXT: During the same tournament, it is not possible to choose the same team or athlete twice, even in different turns.
RULES.SECTION_MODE_P1: Every Survivor league can be configured in one of the following modes:
RULES.SECTION_MODE_SURVIVOR_TEXT: Each turn you pick a team or athlete you think will win their event. If your pick draws, you lose one life (if available). If your pick loses, you are eliminated immediately regardless of how many lives you have. The last player standing wins the league.
RULES.SECTION_MODE_CAMPIONATO_TEXT: Each turn you pick a team or athlete and earn points based on the result: win = 3 pts, draw = 1 pt, loss = 0 pts. At the end of the scheduled turns, the player with the most points wins. There are no eliminations in this mode.
RULES.SECTION_LIVES_P1: The leader can assign more than one life to each player when creating the league (default: 1 life). Lives only protect against draws: if your team draws and you have at least one life, you lose a life instead of being eliminated. If your team loses, you are eliminated immediately regardless of how many lives you have. Having 0 lives does not mean you are eliminated — elimination only occurs when you draw with no lives left, or when your team loses.
RULES.SECTION_LIVES_P2: The leader can also update individual players' lives during the league from the league detail screen.
RULES.SECTION_3_TEXT: Win: you survive, no change to your lives. Draw: you lose one life; if you already have 0 lives, you are eliminated. Loss: you are eliminated immediately regardless of how many lives you have. Missing a pick is treated as a loss.
RULES.SECTION_4_L1: in Survivor mode: only one active player remains (or all remaining players are eliminated in the same turn);
RULES.SECTION_4_L2: in both modes: the number of valid turns set by the league creator is reached.
RULES.SECTION_4_P2: If the turn limit is reached, remaining Survivor players are considered ex aequo; in Championship mode, the player with the most points wins.
RULES.SECTION_4_P3: The maximum number of turns is chosen by the league creator at the time of creation.
RULES.SECTION_5_P1: The choice must be made within 5 minutes before the start of the chosen event.
RULES.SECTION_5_P2: After the event starts, no play can be entered or modified.
RULES.SECTION_6_TEXT: Game turns are based exclusively on the official calendar of the reference sport (championship, league, tournament or other event).
RULES.SECTION_7_P1: If, at the end of a valid turn, all remaining players are eliminated, the tournament ends and the remaining players are considered ex aequo.
RULES.SECTION_8_P1: When the number of remaining players is equal to or less than 10% of the initial participants, players can decide, by majority vote, to conclude the tournament early.
RULES.SECTION_8_P2: Furthermore, if the remaining players (≤10%) remain the same for three consecutive turns without eliminations, the tournament automatically concludes.
RULES.SECTION_9_1_TITLE: 9.1 Postponement Before the Start of the Turn
RULES.SECTION_9_1_P1: If one or more events are postponed before the start of the turn and are not played before the next turn:
RULES.SECTION_9_1_L2: no player is required to play;
RULES.SECTION_9_1_L5: rescheduled matches do not produce retroactive effects.
RULES.SECTION_9_2_TITLE: 9.2 Postponement or Suspension After Turn Started
RULES.SECTION_9_2_P1: If one or more events are postponed or suspended after the turn has started, when plays have already been made:
RULES.SECTION_9_2_L1: players who chose teams or athletes involved remain active;
RULES.SECTION_9_2_L3: the chosen team or athlete is still consumed and cannot be reused;
RULES.SECTION_9_2_L4: for all other players, standard rules apply based on the result of the chosen event.
RULES.SECTION_10_P1: The app does NOT manage money, payments or prize pools.
RULES.SECTION_10_P2: Rules regarding winners, ex aequo or divisions represent a standard game structure. Any economic agreement between participants is external to the app, occurs autonomously and under the exclusive responsibility of the players.

DIALOGS.PRIVACY_INTRO: This Privacy Policy describes how personal data of users who use the Survivor platform (hereinafter "Service") is collected, used and protected, in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
DIALOGS.ABOUT_TEXT: Survivor is a competitive gaming platform where you can challenge your friends in exciting sports tournaments!
DIALOGS.ABOUT_INTRO_1: Survivor is an entertainment app dedicated to fans of Serie A, Tennis and Basketball.
DIALOGS.ABOUT_INTRO_2: Our mission is to offer fun, simple and accessible games and tournaments for everyone.
DIALOGS.ABOUT_INTRO_3: We are a small team passionate about sports and technology, and we believe in fair play and honest competition.
DIALOGS.ABOUT_NOTICE: Survivor is an entertainment game with no monetary prizes. For information on how we handle data and game rules, please refer to our
DIALOGS.ABOUT_CONTACT: For questions or support, write to us at:
DIALOGS.TERMS_1_TEXT: Survivor is a digital entertainment platform that allows users to participate in games and tournaments based on sports choices and competitive dynamics. The service does not constitute gambling or betting activities.
DIALOGS.TERMS_2_TEXT_1: To use Survivor, you must create an account via email. The user is responsible for the accuracy of the information provided and the use of their account.
DIALOGS.TERMS_2_TEXT_2: Only one account is allowed per user. Creating multiple accounts or using automated systems is prohibited.
DIALOGS.TERMS_3_TEXT: The user agrees to use Survivor correctly and in accordance with these conditions. Behaviors that could compromise the proper functioning of the platform are prohibited, including attempts to manipulate results or rankings.
DIALOGS.TERMS_4_TEXT: The rules of games and tournaments are defined within the app and may be modified at any time. Results generated by the platform are considered final and not contestable.
DIALOGS.TERMS_5_TEXT: Survivor does not provide monetary prizes. Any prizes, recognitions or trophies have exclusively symbolic or promotional value.
DIALOGS.TERMS_6_TEXT: The manager reserves the right to suspend or close a user's account, without notice, in case of violation of these conditions or improper use of the service.
DIALOGS.TERMS_7_TEXT_1: The service is provided "as is". The manager does not guarantee the absence of errors, interruptions or malfunctions and is not responsible for any damages arising from the use of the platform.
DIALOGS.TERMS_7_TEXT_2: The manager is not responsible for any inaccuracies in sports data provided by external sources.
DIALOGS.TERMS_8_TEXT: All content on Survivor, including texts, graphics, logos and platform structure, is the property of the manager and cannot be used without authorization.
DIALOGS.TERMS_9_TEXT: These Terms and Conditions may be updated or modified at any time. Changes will be effective upon their publication on the platform.
DIALOGS.TERMS_10_TEXT: These Terms and Conditions are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, the court of the place of residence or headquarters of the manager has exclusive jurisdiction.
DIALOGS.TERMS_11_TEXT: For information or requests, you can contact the manager at the email address:

CONSOLATION.1: Luck wasn't on your side... but you can always cheer for those still in the game! 🍀
CONSOLATION.2: Not everyone can win, but you played with style! 😎
CONSOLATION.3: Next time will be better, I promise! 💪
CONSOLATION.4: You gave it your all, that's what counts! 🌟
CONSOLATION.5: Better eliminated with honor than winner by chance! 🎖️
CONSOLATION.6: Bad luck got you, but you're a champion! 🏆
CONSOLATION.7: Don't cry, there's always the next edition! 😢➡️😊
CONSOLATION.8: You lost the battle, but not the war! ⚔️
CONSOLATION.9: Statistics say you'll win eventually... maybe! 📊😅
CONSOLATION.10: At least now you can sleep peacefully on Sundays! 😴
CONSOLATION.11: Take comfort: you did better than those who didn't even try! 💫
CONSOLATION.12: The wheel turns, next time it'll be your turn! 🎡
CONSOLATION.13: You challenged fate and... well, you lost! But what courage! 🦁
CONSOLATION.14: You weren't eliminated, you were promoted to VIP spectator! 🎭
CONSOLATION.15: Defeat is temporary, glory is eternal... or almost! ✨
CONSOLATION.16: You picked the wrong team, it happens! 🤷
CONSOLATION.17: Your name will remain in history... of your family! 📜
CONSOLATION.18: Better to have been and been eliminated than never to have been! 🤔
CONSOLATION.19: Your elimination is art, pure tragic art! 🎨

MAX.TEXT: Everyone dies eventually. No one is immortal — not even you. This is the maximum allowed.

0.TEXT: Sure you're worth 6 lives? Maybe ask yourself why...

2.TEXT: Other players are already kinda hating you.

0.TEXT: Cats have 9. You're dangerously catching up.

1.TEXT: Confirmed superhero. Just missing the cape.

2.TEXT: Difficulty: «baby mode». At least admit it to your friends.

3.TEXT: 7 lives. It's not even a challenge anymore.

0.TEXT: 8 lives? Death is avoiding you out of sheer pity.

1.TEXT: Eight lives. You're basically afraid of the game itself.

2.TEXT: Opponents have already given up all hope. Thanks.

3.TEXT: This isn't Survivor, it's a walk in the park.

0.TEXT: NINE LIVES. Like a cat, but way less dignified.

1.TEXT: You are officially a cat. At least try to meow.

2.TEXT: Playing the game or just winning by opponent exhaustion?

3.TEXT: Fair play is staring at you with deep, deep disappointment.

CONSIGLI.EMPTY: League table data not available for this round.
CONSIGLI.DISCLAIMER: Score based on win rate, goal balance, home advantage, and opponent strength. Not a guarantee of victory.
CONSIGLI.UNDERDOG_SUBTITLE: The unfancied pick that could surprise

0.TEXT: The algorithm groaned a little, then spat out this name. Trust it.

1.TEXT: Win rate, goal balance, home advantage... the maths says yes. Trust the maths.

2.TEXT: I spent 0.3 seconds processing 40 variables. This is the answer. You're welcome.

3.TEXT: Not an opinion — it's statistics. And statistics rarely apologise.

4.TEXT: Top pick according to our highly sophisticated algorithm. Which is basically some maths, but it sounds cooler.

5.TEXT: Objectively the best choice. Subjectively... still the best choice.

6.TEXT: High win rate, weak opponent, home ground. Three for three. Rarer than a triple jackpot.

7.TEXT: The algorithm has spoken. And it read the entire league table. At least hear it out.

8.TEXT: The form curve is pointing upward. Which is exactly what we like to see.

9.TEXT: My computational logic analysed this team. What does your gut say? Good, ignore your gut.

10.TEXT: Team in form, opponent struggling, home advantage. What more do you need?

11.TEXT: Scientific analysis complete. Verdict: pick it. Second opinion: also pick it.

12.TEXT: This isn't luck, it's applied statistics. Massive difference. Like, huge.

13.TEXT: Number one pick of the day by the numbers. Meaning we're good at this, and you should trust us.

14.TEXT: I did the maths. You didn't. Full trust, eyes closed, let's go.

15.TEXT: The opponent is in freefall. It's almost rude to mention them in the same sentence.

16.TEXT: Great form, home ground, weak opponent. The holy trinity.

17.TEXT: No promises — neither does maths. But the odds are firmly on your side.

18.TEXT: This pick has academic justification. OK not really. But the numbers back it hard.

19.TEXT: The app kind of decided for you. You still have free will. But consider it.

0.TEXT: Not the safe pick. The bold pick. Big difference.

1.TEXT: Statistically unlikely. Emotionally though... there's something here.

2.TEXT: Playing at home against the big guns. Exactly the kind of match that breaks predictions.

3.TEXT: The algorithm thinks they could surprise. Your instincts probably already know.

4.TEXT: Low in the table but with home advantage... who knows? Football history is full of upsets.

5.TEXT: Controlled chaos. Or as controlled as football ever gets.

6.TEXT: The choice no one would expect. Genius if it works, forgettable if it doesn't.

7.TEXT: High risk, high reward. Or as we say: maybe yes, maybe boom.

8.TEXT: The underdog of the round. If they win, you become a legend. If not, everyone forgets.

9.TEXT: High-risk tip. We know. We're being transparent about it.

10.TEXT: Surprises can't be predicted. But they can be sensed. Today the sense points here.

11.TEXT: Playing at home. And at home, teams fight differently. Ask the ultras.

12.TEXT: The underdog, yes. But with heart, hunger, and home advantage? Maybe the story changes.

13.TEXT: Not the safest shot. But possibly the most satisfying one.

14.TEXT: The dark horse of the round. If it pays off, you'll tell this story for years.

15.TEXT: Risk it knowingly. The algorithm spotted something here. Worth a look.

16.TEXT: This pick comes from another dimension. The one where epic upsets happen.

17.TEXT: Don't hope too much. But not too little either. That range right there.

18.TEXT: Sure the opponent is strong. But they're at home. And home gives strength. Numbers confirm.

19.TEXT: Football is beautiful because nothing is ever certain. This team is proof.

FAQ.TITLE: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.A1: Survivor is an elimination game based on football matches. Each round you choose a team: if it wins, you stay in the game; if it loses or draws (according to the rules), you are eliminated.
FAQ.A2: To participate, you must be added to a group, accept the rules, and submit your choice within the deadline for the round.
FAQ.Q3: How do I choose the team?
FAQ.A3: You can choose a team from those playing in the available round. The choice must be made before the deadline indicated in the app.
FAQ.Q4: Can I choose the same team multiple times?
FAQ.A4: No. Each team can only be chosen once throughout the competition, unless otherwise specified in the league's specific rules.
FAQ.Q5: What happens if I forget to choose?
FAQ.A5: If you don't submit your choice within the established deadline, you will be automatically eliminated from the competition.
FAQ.Q6: When is the choice considered valid?
FAQ.A6: The choice is valid only if made correctly before the deadline and confirmed by the app.
FAQ.Q7: What happens in case of postponement or suspension of a match?
FAQ.A7: In case of postponement or suspension, the rules indicated in the official competition rules apply (e.g., match cancelled, choice to be redone, or result valid only if completed).
FAQ.A8: It depends on the competition format. In some modes a draw equals elimination, in others not. Always refer to the active rules.
FAQ.A9: Results are automatically updated in the app at the end of official matches.
FAQ.A10: Yes, you can change your choice until the round deadline. After closing, it will no longer be possible to modify it.
FAQ.Q11: What happens if multiple players win Survivor?
FAQ.A11: If multiple players remain without eliminations until the end of the calendar, the winner (or winners) is determined according to league rules (e.g., playoff, shared prize, extra round).
FAQ.A12: Any prizes depend on the league or game group. The app manages the game but is not responsible for prize management.
FAQ.A13: No. Survivor is a recreational game based on predictions, without gambling purposes.
FAQ.A14: Yes. Personal data is processed in compliance with current privacy regulations and used only for app functionality.
FAQ.Q15: Can I participate in multiple Survivors simultaneously?
FAQ.A15: Yes, you can participate in multiple competitions if enabled by the organizer.
FAQ.Q16: Who can I contact for assistance?
FAQ.A16: For technical problems or questions, use the Contact section in the app or write to

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.SUBTITLE: Survivor
PRIVACY.INTRO: This Privacy Policy describes how personal data of users using the Survivor platform (hereinafter "Service") is collected, used and protected, in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_P1: The data controller is the manager of the Survivor platform.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_P2: For any request regarding this Privacy Policy, you can contact the controller at the email address:
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_INTRO: Personal data collected through the use of the Service is limited to what is strictly necessary for its operation:
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_L1: Email address (used for authentication via magic link)
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_L4: Technical data on Service usage (logs, device and access information)
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_INTRO: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_L1: Allow registration and access to the Service
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_L2: Enable participation in games and tournaments
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_L4: Ensure security and proper functioning of the Service
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_INTRO: The processing of personal data is carried out on the basis of:
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_L1: Performance of the contract to which the user is a party (use of the Service)
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_L2: Legitimate interest of the controller in security and platform improvement
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_P1: Data processing is carried out using IT and telematic tools, in compliance with the principles of lawfulness, fairness, transparency and data minimization.
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_P2: Adequate security measures are adopted to protect personal data from unauthorized access, loss or unlawful use.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_P1: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to provide the Service.
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_P2: The user can at any time request the deletion of their account and associated data.
PRIVACY.SECTION_7_P1: Personal data is not sold or transferred to third parties.
PRIVACY.SECTION_7_P2: Data may be processed by technical service providers (e.g., hosting or email services) exclusively for purposes related to the operation of the Service.
PRIVACY.SECTION_8_P1: The controller may process data in aggregated and anonymous form for statistical purposes and analysis of platform usage.
PRIVACY.SECTION_8_P2: Such data does not allow user identification in any way.
PRIVACY.SECTION_9_INTRO: The user has the right to:
PRIVACY.SECTION_9_L3: Object to or limit processing, in cases provided by law
PRIVACY.SECTION_9_P: Requests can be sent to the email address:
PRIVACY.SECTION_10_P1: The Service is reserved for users who are at least 14 years old.
PRIVACY.SECTION_10_P2: By registering, the user declares to meet the required age requirements.
PRIVACY.SECTION_11_P1: The web app may use technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the Service.
PRIVACY.SECTION_11_P2: Profiling cookies are not used without user consent.
PRIVACY.SECTION_12_P1: This Privacy Policy may be updated at any time.
PRIVACY.SECTION_12_P2: Changes will be effective from their publication on the platform.

SLIDE_1.TITLE: Welcome to Survivor!
SLIDE_1.DESC: The only game where you pick a different team each round. Win and go on. Lose or skip — and you're out. Win or go home!

SLIDE_2.TITLE: Pick your team
SLIDE_2.DESC: Each round, pick a winning team from football, basketball or tennis. You can't reuse the same team in the same season — plan ahead!

SLIDE_3.TITLE: Draw or deadline miss = out
SLIDE_3.DESC: Draw or loss = elimination. Missing the deadline = automatic elimination. Watch the countdown and choose wisely!

SLIDE_4.TITLE: Leagues
SLIDE_4.DESC: You play inside a League with friends or strangers. Leagues can be public (open to all) or private (invite-only or leader-approved).

SLIDE_5.TITLE: Join a league
SLIDE_5.DESC: Search for a public league from the home screen, or use the link or code shared by a friend. For private leagues, the leader will approve your request.

SLIDE_6.TITLE: Create your league
SLIDE_6.DESC: Want to be in charge? Create a new league, choose the championship, invite your friends and become Leader: you'll manage everything and declare the winner!

SLIDE_7.TITLE: Last one standing wins!
SLIDE_7.DESC: Outlast everyone else and take the win. Your league, your rules, your glory!

SLIDE_1.TITLE: You are the Leader!
SLIDE_1.DESC: You created this league and you're in charge. Let's walk through everything you can do to manage it perfectly.

SLIDE_2.TITLE: Public or Private?
SLIDE_2.DESC: Public league: anyone can find and join it. Private league: only people with the link can request access, and you approve or reject each one.

SLIDE_3.TITLE: Start the league!
SLIDE_3.DESC: Once you've invited your players, press "Start" to kick things off. Without this step the league stays on hold and nobody can play.

SLIDE_4.TITLE: Invite players
SLIDE_4.DESC: Share the league link or invite via email. If the league is private, join requests come to you — approve or reject them from the "Requests" section.

SLIDE_5.TITLE: Players make their picks
SLIDE_5.DESC: Each round, every player must pick a team they think will win. Miss the deadline and they're automatically eliminated. Keep an eye on everyone!

SLIDE_6.TITLE: Calculate the round
SLIDE_6.DESC: After the matches are over, press "Calculate" in the actions panel. The system processes all results: winners survive, losers and draws get eliminated.

SLIDE_7.TITLE: Suspensions & control
SLIDE_7.DESC: If a match is postponed or suspended, manage it from the "Suspensions" panel. You can also remove a player from the league or undo a pick if needed.

SLIDE_8.TITLE: Force results
SLIDE_8.DESC: Click "Show Results" to view the round's results. From there you can manually force the outcome of a single match — useful if there's an error or a special situation.

SLIDE_9.TITLE: Pick for others
SLIDE_9.DESC: As leader you can tap any player's cell and choose a team on their behalf. Use it carefully — for example to fix a mistake or help a player who can't log in.

SLIDE_10.TITLE: You are the referee!
SLIDE_10.DESC: The last player standing wins the league. You're the one to declare it! You can also close the league manually or reopen it if everyone gets eliminated.

SLIDE_1.TITLE: You're in the league!
SLIDE_1.DESC: Welcome to your Survivor league! Each round you must pick a team. Survive the eliminations and be the last one standing!

SLIDE_2.TITLE: How to make your pick
SLIDE_2.DESC: Press the "Gioca ora" button to select the team you think will win that round. Confirm your choice and you're set!

SLIDE_3.TITLE: You can change your mind!
SLIDE_3.DESC: Already picked but had second thoughts? You can edit your pick until the deadline closes. Tap your pick and choose "Edit".

SLIDE_4.TITLE: Deadline is everything
SLIDE_4.DESC: You have until the round closes to make your pick. The countdown is visible on the league screen. Don't wait until the last second!

SLIDE_5.TITLE: One team per season
SLIDE_5.DESC: You cannot pick the same team twice in the same season. Plan ahead and keep track of the teams you've already used in your history.

SLIDE_6.TITLE: Eliminated? You can stay!
SLIDE_6.DESC: Getting eliminated doesn't mean you disappear — you can keep following the league as a spectator, watch others' picks and react with emojis.

SLIDE_7.TITLE: Read the history
SLIDE_7.DESC: Each pick in the history has a colour: green = win (survived), red = loss or draw (eliminated). Tap the history icon next to a name to see it.

SLIDE_8.TITLE: Reactions & history
SLIDE_8.DESC: Long-press on someone's pick to react with an emoji! Click the history icon next to a player's name to see all their picks.

GUIDE.HERO_DESC: Everything you need to start playing, make your picks and challenge your friends in sports leagues.
GUIDE.S0_P1: Survivor is a fantasy sports league platform. Each matchday you pick one team: if it wins, you survive. If it loses or you don't pick, you're eliminated. If it draws, you lose a life. The last one standing wins — or whoever accumulates the most points, depending on the mode.
GUIDE.S0_P2: You can play with friends in private leagues or join public leagues. Available competitions include Serie A, Serie B, La Liga, NBA, Australian Open, Roland Garros, US Open and Wimbledon.
GUIDE.S0_MODE_SURVIVOR_LI4: Run out of lives and you're out
GUIDE.S0_TIP: You can join multiple leagues at the same time, even across different sports.
GUIDE.S1_P1: Survivor uses a Magic Link: no password to remember. You get a link via email, click it, and you're in. On first access your account is created automatically.
GUIDE.S1_LI1_TEXT: Open the app and type your email address on the login screen.
GUIDE.S1_LI2_TEXT: You'll receive an email with a login link. Also check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive within a minute.
GUIDE.S1_LI3_TEXT: The link authenticates you automatically. No password required.
GUIDE.S1_LI4_TEXT: Set a nickname and, if you want, choose your favourite team for each sport.
GUIDE.S1_INFO: The Magic Link expires. If it expires before you click it, go back to the login screen and request a new one.
GUIDE.S2_P1: After logging in you land on the Home, your main control panel. Everything is managed from here.
GUIDE.S2_CARD1_TEXT: All the leagues you're participating in, including those awaiting approval.
GUIDE.S2_CARD2_TEXT: Browse and join open leagues created by other users.
GUIDE.S2_CARD3_TEXT: Start your own custom league and invite friends.
GUIDE.S2_CARD4_TEXT: Results, join requests, pick deadlines and much more.
GUIDE.S2_P2: Leagues show a popularity badge ranging from New to Hall of Fame based on the number of participants and activity.
GUIDE.S2_TIP: Use the filters at the top of the list to find leagues by sport, competition or status (ongoing, upcoming, finished).
GUIDE.S3_P1: There are three ways to join a league:
GUIDE.S3_LI1_TEXT: If a friend sent you a link, open it directly. Click "Join" to enter right away.
GUIDE.S3_LI2_TEXT: From the Home go to "Public leagues", find the one you want and press "Join".
GUIDE.S3_LI3_TEXT: Some private leagues require a password. Ask the creator and enter it when prompted.
GUIDE.S3_P2: If the league is not open access, your request will need to be approved by the Leader. You'll receive a notification when it's accepted or rejected.
GUIDE.S3_WARN: You can't make picks until your registration is approved and the league has started.
GUIDE.S4_P1: The pick is the heart of the game: each matchday you choose one team from those playing in the current round.
GUIDE.S4_LI1_TEXT: From the Home, enter the league. You'll see the "Make your pick" button for the current matchday.
GUIDE.S4_LI2_TEXT: You'll see all matches with teams, kick-off times and odds. Expand each match to see the last 5 results.
GUIDE.S4_LI3_TEXT: The system suggests a team by analysing reliability, season win %, home advantage and opponent weakness. Useful, not infallible!
GUIDE.S4_LI4_TEXT: Click on your chosen team and confirm. You can make it public (visible immediately) or hidden (revealed only when the match starts).
GUIDE.S4_WARN: You can edit or cancel your pick until the first match of the matchday starts. After that it's locked.
GUIDE.S4_TIP: Enable push notifications: the app alerts you when the deadline is approaching.
GUIDE.S5_P1: At the end of each matchday the Leader calculates the results. From that moment you can see the Recap: a full summary of all picks.
GUIDE.S5_CARD1_TEXT: See what each participant chose and whether they won or lost.
GUIDE.S5_CARD2_TEXT: The most-selected team of the matchday.
GUIDE.S5_CARD3_TEXT: Add emoji reactions to other players' picks to celebrate (or tease).
GUIDE.S5_CARD4_TEXT: Find out who ran out of lives and who is still in the game.
GUIDE.S5_INFO: You can view the recap for any past matchday from the 'Matchdays' section inside the league.
GUIDE.S6_P1: Every league has a real-time leaderboard. In Survivor mode it shows remaining lives; in Championship mode it shows accumulated points.
GUIDE.S6_P2: Trophies are your personal hall of fame: they track all wins and podiums (top 3) earned over time, across all leagues and championships.
GUIDE.S6_TIP: Go to your profile to see your trophies and compare stats with other players.
GUIDE.S7_P1: From the Home press "Create league" and configure the rules to your liking.
GUIDE.S7_LI1_TEXT: Choose the sport and specific competition (e.g. Serie A, NBA, Roland Garros).
GUIDE.S7_LI2_TEXT: Give the league a name, set the edition number and choose between Survivor and Championship.
GUIDE.S7_LI3_TEXT: Decide which matchday the league starts and when it ends.
GUIDE.S7_LI4_TEXT: How many lives each player has. 1 life = immediate elimination on the first mistake.
GUIDE.S7_LI5_TEXT: Public = anyone can join. Private = only those with the link or password. You can require manual approval for each registration.
GUIDE.S7_LI6_TEXT: Enter friends' emails to invite them, or share the league link.
GUIDE.S7_INFO: As Leader you have access to extra features: approving registrations, calculating results at the end of a matchday, managing player lives and correcting any mistakes.
GUIDE.S8_LI1_TEXT: Don't wait until the last moment: matches can start and lock the selection.
GUIDE.S8_LI2_TEXT: Don't want others to copy your choice? Set your pick as hidden: it's revealed only at kick-off.
GUIDE.S8_LI3_TEXT: In Survivor the goal is to last. Consider home advantage and recent form, not just the odds.
GUIDE.S8_LI4_TITLE: The AI Suggestion is a starting point
GUIDE.S8_LI4_TEXT: The algorithm is useful but not infallible. Use it as a guide, then decide for yourself.
GUIDE.S8_LI5_TEXT: You'll receive alerts before the pick deadline and when results are calculated.
GUIDE.S8_LI6_TEXT: The daily recap shows everyone's choices: analysing opponents' trends can become part of your strategy.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q1: I didn't receive the Magic Link, what should I do?
GUIDE.FAQ_A1: Check your spam or junk folder. If it's not there, wait a minute and try again. Make sure you're using the correct email address.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q2: Can I change my pick after confirming it?
GUIDE.FAQ_A2: Yes, you can edit or cancel it as long as the first match of the matchday hasn't started. After that it's locked.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q3: What happens if I forget to make a pick?
GUIDE.FAQ_A3: In Survivor you're eliminated immediately, just as if you had chosen a losing team. In Championship you don't earn points for that matchday.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q4: Can I join multiple leagues at the same time?
GUIDE.FAQ_A4: Yes, there's no limit. You can be in leagues across different sports, competitions and modes at the same time.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q5: Who calculates the results at the end of a matchday?
GUIDE.FAQ_A5: The league Leader. If results are taking a while, contact the Leader. If you're the Leader, you'll find the 'Calculate results' button in the league management screen.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q6: Does a "hidden" pick have any strategic value?
GUIDE.FAQ_A6: Yes: it prevents others from copying your choice in real time. They'll only see it after the kick-off whistle.
GUIDE.FAQ_Q7: Are my trophies visible to everyone?
GUIDE.FAQ_A7: Yes, your trophies and stats are also visible to others from your public profile page.
GUIDE.FAQ_A8: Yes, you can leave a league from its panel. If you're the Leader with active participants, consider transferring the role before leaving.
